arms.description: AZD9291 (80 mg or 40 mg orally, once daily), in accordance with the randomization schedule.
arms.label: AZD9291

arms.description: Matching placebo for AZD9291 (80 mg or 40 mg orally, once daily), in accordance with the randomization schedule.
arms.label: Placebo AZD9291

brief_title: AZD9291 Versus Placebo in Patients With Stage IB-IIIA Non-small Cell Lung Carcinoma, Following Complete Tumour Resection With or Without Adjuvant Chemotherapy.
conditions: Stage IB-IIIA Non-small Cell Lung Carcinoma
keywords: Stage IB-IIA-IIIA Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer; EGFRm+; Ex19Del; L858R; AZD9291; Phase III, adjuvant chemotherapy; complete tumour resection; EGFR-TKI
official_title: A Phase III, Double-blind, Randomized, Placebo-controlled Multi-centre, Study to Assess the Efficacy and Safety of AZD9291 Versus Placebo, in Patients With Epidermal Growth Factor Receptor Mutation Positive Stage IB-IIIA Non-small Cell Lung Carcinoma, Following Complete Tumour Resection With or Without Adjuvant Chemotherapy (ADAURA).

primary_outcomes.description: Defined as the time from the date of randomization until the date of disease recurrence or death (by any cause in the absence of recurrence).
primary_outcomes.measure: Assess the Efficacy of AZD9291 Compared to Placebo as Measured by Disease Free Survival (DFS).
primary_outcomes.time_frame: Up to approximately 5 years after the first patient is randomized (maximum follow up of 70 months)

secondary_outcomes.measure: Disease Free Survival (DFS) Rate at 2, 3 and 5 Years
secondary_outcomes.time_frame: Up to approximately 5 years after the first patient is randomized (maximum follow up of 70 months). DFS rate at 2 years (%), 3 years (%) and 5 years (%) are presented.
Up to approximately 7 years after the first patient is randomized (maximum follow up of 86 months)

secondary_outcomes.measure: Overall Survival Rate at 2, 3 and 5 Years
secondary_outcomes.time_frame: Up to approximately 7 years after the first patient is randomized (maximum follow up of 86 months). OS rate at 2 years (%), 3 years (%) and 5 years (%) are presented.

secondary_outcomes.measure: Patient Health-related Quality of Life and Symptoms (HRQoL) by SF-36v2 Health Survey.
secondary_outcomes.time_frame: Measured by SF-36 Questionnaire at baseline, 12 week, 24 week and then every 24 weeks until study complete, disease recurrence or other discontinuation criteria met, up to 3 years.
Collected at pre-dose, 0.5-1.5hours and 2-4hours post-dose up to 96 weeks (approximately 24 months)
From date of dosing to week 96 (approximately 24 months)
From date of dosing to week 96 (approximately 24 months)
